content:
I'd like to know if there are existing kernel modules which are already re-written in Rust? I want to learn to build kernel modules in Rust, but I have only "hello-world" examples.

Is it possible to re-write, for example, a project like ovpn-dco to Rust currently?
There are various projects listed below "users" in the sidebar at https://rust-for-linux.com/
Nikolai Shv has marked this topic as resolved.
Nikolai Shv has marked this topic as unresolved.
